items.title: Frontier Airlines exits 10 cities, slows growth to achieve profits
items.description: After a net loss of $137 million in 2025, Frontier Airlines is making changes in order to grow its profits.

items.title: Alila Mayakoba is now open in Mexico — and you can book from 21,000 Hyatt points
items.description: Here's what we know about the now-open Alila Mayakoba.

items.title: I earned points paying my mortgage via Bilt — how to set up your account to do the same
items.description: I paid my mortgage via Bilt and earned 3,000 points. Here are the steps to take to set up your account to start earning rewards on housing payments.

items.title: Southwest unveils 7 new routes covering 10 cities — and new Costa Rica service
items.description: Southwest Airlines added more than a half-dozen routes as it extended its schedule through October, including new international flights to Costa Rica.

items.title: EVA Air to launch Washington, DC's first-ever nonstop flight to Taiwan
items.description: EVA Air will connect Washington, D.C., with Taipei, Taiwan, beginning in July.
